name: ddd-expert
description: Adversarial HITP EventStorming plus confirmed-Model implementation and review

interface.longDescription: DDD workflow that facilitates the ten EventStorming steps one frontier decision at a time, challenges the integrated model from multiple perspectives, writes one draft meeting record for approval, and synchronizes ready Models after explicit model confirmation; Codify implements the ready iteration and Guard closes it as implemented.
defaultPrompt: Use $ddd-expert:event-storming to facilitate the ten EventStorming steps on a temporary EventStorming Board. Ask one frontier decision at a time, recommend design choices with their strongest credible alternative, validate and write one meeting record with status: draft, summarize it for explicit user confirmation, then set status: ready and synchronize affected Models for $ddd-expert:codify.
